zh.lifeSummary: 當Isabella de Warenne於1165年出生在英國諾福爾可時，她的父親Hamelin de Warenne Earl of Surrey36歲，母親Isabel de Warenne 4th Countess of Surrey29歲。她於1196年之前與Gilbert de l'Aigle結婚。他們至少是3個兒子和1個女兒的父母。她去世於1234年11月30日之前。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Isabella de Warenne于1165年出生在英国諾福爾可时，她的父亲Hamelin de Warenne Earl of Surrey36岁，母亲Isabel de Warenne 4th Countess of Surrey29岁。她于1196年之前与Gilbert de l'Aigle结婚。他们至少是3个儿子和1个女儿的父母。她去世于1234年11月30日之前。

nameMeanings.name: de
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Dilip, Anirban, Gopal, Alok, Anindya, Arunava, Asit, Asok, Dibyendu, Goutam, Indra, Indranil.

variants.name: Dey
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Ashit, Indu, Naina, Partha, Soumya, Ajit, Anjan, Anjana, Anup, Arjun, Arun, Ashim.
English, Scottish, and Welsh: variant of   Day  .
German: topographic name from a field name in North Rhine-Westphalia, denoting a sizeable piece of land, from Middle Low German dē ‘thigh’ (referring to the shape of the property).

nameMeanings.name: Isabella
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: form of   Isabel  , which has been popular in England since the 18th century and has recently become the preferred form of the name.

variants.name: Isobella
meanings: form of   Isabel  , which has been popular in England since the 18th century and has recently become the preferred form of the name.

historicEvents.title: Magna Carta
historicEvents.description: King John of England agreed to a charter of rights called the Magna Carta. The document was originally drafted by the Archbishop of Canterbury to establish peace between King John and a group of rebel barons. The Magna Carta was completed in 1215 and is now considered to be one of the greatest constitutional documents of all time.

historicEvents.title: France Declares War on England
historicEvents.description: France declared war on England as Louis VIII of France attacked Poitou and northern Gascony.

en.lifeSummary: When Isabella de Warenne was born in 1165, in Norfolk, England, her father, Hamelin de Warenne Earl of Surrey, was 36 and her mother, Isabel de Warenne 4th Countess of Surrey, was 29. She married Gilbert de l'Aigle before 1196. They were the parents of at least 3 sons and 1 daughter. She died before 30 November 1234.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Isabella de Warenne est née en 1165, à Norfolk, Angleterre, son père, Hamelin de Warenne Earl of Surrey, avait 36 ans et sa mère, Isabel de Warenne 4th Countess of Surrey, avait 29 ans. Elle a épousé Gilbert de l'Aigle avant 1196. Ils ont eu au moins 3 fils et 1 fille. Elle est décédée avant 30 novembre 1234.

de.lifeSummary: Als Isabella de Warenne 1165 in Norfolk, England geboren wurde, war ihr Vater Hamelin de Warenne Earl of Surrey 36 und ihre Mutter Isabel de Warenne 4th Countess of Surrey 29. Sie hat vor 1196 Gilbert de l'Aigle geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 3 Söhne und 1 Tochter. Sie starb vor 30. November 1234.

ko.Lewes, Lewes District, East Sussex, Engl: 영국 잉글랜드 수세스 루스 루스 스트 존 위토우트
ko.lifeSummary: Isabella de Warenne(이)가 1165년 영국 노르폴크에서 태어났을 때, 그녀의 아버지 Hamelin de Warenne Earl of Surrey(은)는 36세였고, 그녀의 어머니 Isabel de Warenne 4th Countess of Surrey(은)는 29세였다. 그녀는 1196년 이전 Gilbert de l'Aigle(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 세 명의 아들과 한 명의 딸을 두었다. 그녀는 1234년 11월 30일 이전 사망했다.

Ela casou-se com Gilbert de l'Aigle antes 1196. Eles tiveram pelo menos 3 filhos e 1 filha. Ela faleceu antes 30 de novembro de 1234.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Isabella de Warenne родилась в 1165 г. в местности норфолк, Англия, её отцу по имени Hamelin de Warenne Earl of Surrey было 36 лет, а матери, которую звали Isabel de Warenne 4th Countess of Surrey, 29. Она вышла замуж за человека по имени Gilbert de l'Aigle перед 1196 г. У них было по крайней мере 3 сына и 1 дочь. Она умерла перед 30 ноябрь 1234 г.
